item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
some proofreadz
feel free to let me know if these choices were tonal

first of all, it bothers me in a weird way that you described -2 before you described -1. that's not super important, maybe it's a me thing, and it's clearly intentional from the pacing of the article. but… it does still bother me.

 Currently, SCP-4074-1 is being contained in the onsite infirmary ICU for anomalous humanoids. As soon as subject is physically and mentally fit or an interview, any qualified personnel in the immediate vicinity is authorized to begin interrogating the subject.

normally, when there's a major update to the SCP's condition, a section like this would be struck through completely. 
 Update:On

needs an additional space. 
 Approximately two weeks after its initial appearance, the gas, which usually have

that should be "which usually has". 
 Excluding its initial discovery and the following ICU incident, no further activity or properties from or related to the subject is deemed anomalous.

this sentence is phrased weird. maybe just "nothing else related to the subject has been found to be anomalous"? 
 Foundation manufactured sample were given

"samples" should be plural here. 
 After test results showed mild toxicity, Foundation agents, disguised as international biologist and botanists were given permission to remove all traces of the tree.

"biologists" should be plural. i think this needs another comma after "botanists". 
 the following words,

that should be a colon. also, i believe the quote should be formatted in a quote block. 
 Subject has shown no signs or consciousness ever since.

i believe that's "vital signs".

i still +1'd this article, i greatly enjoyed it. felt like a nice short story akin to a series II article.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
If my interpretation is correct, I love the emotional core of this article. A father wanting to create safe anomalous objects for his daughter's joy is heartwarming. But, him seeing and being paranoid about outside groups (nefarious or otherwise) interested in his work, thus causing him to separate himself from his family, is heartbreaking.

Even so, the article as-written does not facilitate the emotion upon reading it; I added things and pictured the father-daughter relationship in my head to make it give me that strong emotional punch, but not all readers do that.

+1, nonetheless.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
In the following addenda, there was a tree growing out of his hand.
Maybe I'll make him a little bit anomalous.

They were planning to interview him but he died before they could do so.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: What's with the description of the man at the end? I see no need to mention him. If he had no anomalous qualities, he would probably get interviewed, and then he would get amnestics. That's really all that you need to put if you want to include the man.

item.title: Credits and Image Sources
item.content:encoded:
It's a bit late(and possibly meaningless) but,

Thank you,

Zyn, TheyCallMeDub, and Affiefuu for the various feedbacks in the Brainstorming Forum.

TheDuckman for his feedbacks in the Draft Forum.

The first image is from two combined and edited images from,

https://www.flickr.com/photos/proflowers/16951071849
specifically from
https://www.proflowers.com/
,and
https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/File:Translucent_Helix_Nebula.png

The second image is from two combined and edited images from,

https://www.flickr.com/photos/proflowers/16146140314
specifically from
https://www.proflowers.com/
, and
https://purepng.com/photo/310/nature-sun

Edit: Revised version still under construction.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Hi there KuzonFilms.

Maybe the ratings are poor because of the cliche nature of the addenda? Having a man be on the run from a mysterious group, lying to his daughter about being busy with work, and giving her a magical gift sounds like the origin story for many a little girl protagonist. Just a thought.

Well the story already ended with the humanoid's death.
No one really knows if it ever had a family or if it did, what happened with its family afterwards.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Hey Allera. Personally, I really liked this article. Your photoshop work was brilliant. Maybe the ratings are poor because of the cliche nature of the addenda? Having a man be on the run from a mysterious group, lying to his daughter about being busy with work, and giving her a magical gift sounds like the origin story for many a little girl protagonist. Just a thought.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Assuming you just mean invisible letters you could achieve that with some CSS:

Thank you very much for that. It was just exactly what I was looking for1.
I rewrote OOI in the third addenda.

Footnotes
1. Although seeing the curretnt rating of the article, it might have been all for naught. But thanks anyway for showing me a useful code.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
By any chance do you know how to add letter-by-letter blank spaces horizontally?

Can you elaborate? Assuming you just mean invisible letters you could achieve that with some CSS:

 Some [[span style="visibility: hidden"]]hidden[[/span]] text inside that [[span style="visibility: hidden"]]still ta[[/span]]kes up space.

appears as:

Some hidden text
inside that still takes up space.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The Foundation is an international and scientific organization. They use metric.

Oh yeah.
I forgot about that.
I'll change the dude's height and the case's dimension.

OOI, I can't tell what this means. "Out of interest"?

I'm sorry about that.
It actually meant "Object of Interest".
I'll add it.

continue
close

You had some missing spaces I added in for you.

Thanks.

By any chance do you know how to add letter-by-letter blank spaces horizontally?

but the addenda didn't really do it for me. The humanoid's relationship with the flowers and the letters isn't clear to me. Neutral vote.

The humanoid's relationship with the flower is revealed on the third addenda, in the transcribed message from OOI 1.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
The images and beginning was interesting, but the addenda didn't really do it for me. The humanoid's relationship with the flowers and the letters isn't clear to me. Neutral vote.

+ Comments
- Comments

You had some missing spaces I added in for you.

in a cement casing 6 x 1.5 x 2 ft

The Foundation is an international and scientific organization. They use metric.

OOI

I can't tell what this means. "Out of interest"?
